questions.question: How can you change your profile photo in Notion?

options.text: By changing your preferred name in the settings menu
options.explanation: Changing your preferred name updates your display name, not your profile photo.

options.text: By going to Settings in your sidebar and selecting your current photo
options.explanation: To change your profile photo, go to Settings in your sidebar, select your current photo, and choose a new file from your device.

options.text: By uploading a file to your account security settings
options.explanation: Profile photos are managed under the user profile section within Settings, not account security.

options.text: Only in the Notion mobile app
options.explanation: Profile photo changes are supported on both Notion for desktop and web.

questions.question: What are the security requirements for setting a password in Notion?

options.text: At least eight characters long, with at least three special characters, one letter, and one number
options.explanation: Notion requires passwords to meet specific complexity criteria to ensure account security.

options.text: At least six characters long, with at least one special character
options.explanation: Notion requires a minimum of eight characters and specific character types.

options.text: Any length is acceptable as long as it is unique
options.explanation: Complexity requirements (length and character types) are mandatory for password strength.

options.text: At least 12 characters long, with no special characters allowed
options.explanation: Special characters are required, and the minimum length is eight, not twelve.

questions.question: What is the correct path to change your email address?

options.text: Settings in your sidebar → Account security → Change email
options.explanation: While you go to Settings, you must navigate to your specific profile name first, then Account security.

options.text: Settings in your sidebar → {your name} → Account security → Change email
options.explanation: This is the correct path: Settings -> Your Name -> Account security -> Change email.

options.text: Settings in your sidebar → Preferences → Account security
options.explanation: Email changes are handled under the Account security section of your specific profile settings, not Preferences.

options.text: Settings in your sidebar → Change email → Enter new address
options.explanation: There is no direct 'Change email' link in the main Settings sidebar; it is nested under your profile.

questions.question: How can you configure the 'On startup' behavior for the Notion desktop app?

options.text: Choose 'Continue where you left off' or 'Your default page'
options.explanation: In Desktop app settings, you can select to resume from your last session or start with a specific default page.

options.text: Always open the last page visited 24 hours ago
options.explanation: The options are specifically 'Continue where you left off' or 'Your default page'.

options.text: Open a random page from your entire workspace history
options.explanation: The desktop app does not have a 'random' startup option; it is deterministic based on your selection.

options.text: Open a blank page every time
options.explanation: While 'Your default page' might be blank, 'Continue where you left off' is the alternative to a blank slate.

questions.question: What two settings must be enabled to ensure Notion links open in your desktop app?

options.text: Toggle 'Open links in desktop app' and ensure 'Open links in browser' is turned off
options.explanation: You must enable the desktop app preference and disable the browser setting to force links to open in the application.

options.text: Toggle 'Close redirecting browser tabs' and 'Open links in desktop app'
options.explanation: Closing tabs is a separate feature; the browser setting must be turned off to prevent the browser from hijacking the link.

options.text: Toggle 'Open links in desktop app' and 'Command Search'
options.explanation: Command Search is unrelated to how links are opened; the browser setting is the key control here.

options.text: Toggle 'New Tab Search' and 'Open links in desktop app'
options.explanation: New Tab Search controls what appears when you open a new tab, not how existing links behave.

questions.question: What happens if you turn 'Profile discoverability' off in your Preferences?

options.text: You will be removed from all workspaces you are part of
options.explanation: Turning this off only hides your profile picture and name from people with your email address who invite you to new workspaces.

options.text: Users in the same workspace will no longer be able to see you
options.explanation: The article specifically notes that if you are already in the same workspace, they will still be able to see your profile.

options.text: Your profile will be hidden from people with your email address who invite you to a new workspace
options.explanation: When 'Profile discoverability' is off, the inviting user cannot see your name or photo until you join the workspace.

options.text: No effect, this setting only applies to the mobile app
options.explanation: This setting is found in the desktop Preferences menu and applies to the account globally.

questions.question: What is the keyboard shortcut to toggle Dark Mode on desktop?

options.text: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + L
options.explanation: The shortcut Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + L is used to turn dark mode on or off in Notion for desktop.

options.text: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + D
options.explanation: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + D is not a valid shortcut for dark mode in this context.

options.text: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + M
options.explanation: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + M is not the shortcut for dark mode.

options.text: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + O
options.explanation: Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + O is not the shortcut for dark mode.

questions.question: If you receive an email notification about a password change you didn't initiate, what should you do?

options.text: Ignore the email as it is likely a marketing newsletter
options.explanation: You should reset your password immediately if you receive an unexpected password change notification.

options.text: Reset your password as soon as possible
options.explanation: Resetting your password immediately secures your account against unauthorized access.

options.text: Reply to the email asking for verification
options.explanation: You should never reply to emails asking for sensitive information like passwords.

options.text: Contact the sender to confirm the change
options.explanation: You should reset your password immediately rather than trying to verify the email.

questions.question: How can you stop your account from being recorded in page analytics?

options.text: Go to Settings → Preferences → Privacy → Show my view history → Don't record
options.explanation: This setting allows you to opt out of participating in analytics altogether or for specific pages.

options.text: Go to Settings → Account security → Analytics → Opt out
options.explanation: Analytics settings are located under Preferences in the Privacy section, not Account security.

options.text: You cannot opt out of page analytics
options.explanation: You can opt out by selecting 'Don't record' under the 'Show my view history' dropdown.

options.text: Go to Settings → Appearance → View history → Disable
options.explanation: View history and analytics are separate from the Appearance settings.

questions.question: You are trying to change your email address but see an error: 'A user with this email already exists.' What is the solution?

options.text: Log into the existing account and delete it to free up the email
options.explanation: Since the email is tied to another account, you must log into that account and delete it before you can use the email for your current account.

options.text: Contact Notion support to merge the accounts
options.explanation: There is no merge function; you must delete the conflicting account to use the email.

options.text: Change the email on the old account first
options.explanation: You cannot change the email on the old account until you change it on the new account, creating a circular dependency.

options.text: You must wait 30 days for the email to become available
options.explanation: You do not need to wait; you can resolve this immediately by deleting the conflicting account.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'Command Search' setting in the Notion desktop app?

options.text: Allows you to quickly search in Notion while you are in another app
options.explanation: Command Search enables global search functionality so you can find Notion content without switching applications.

options.text: Searches only the current page you are viewing
options.explanation: Command Search allows for broader searching, not just the current page.

options.text: Searches for commands rather than content
options.explanation: It searches for content (pages, blocks) within Notion.

options.text: Searches the web for content related to your current page
options.explanation: It searches within the Notion application, not the web.

questions.question: How can you change your time zone in Notion?

options.text: Set it manually or turn on 'Automatically update time zone'
options.explanation: You can manually set your time zone or toggle 'Automatically update time zone' to let your device handle it.

options.text: It is automatically determined by your browser's location
options.explanation: While automatic update is an option, manual setting is also available.

options.text: You must contact Notion support to change it
options.explanation: You can change your time zone yourself in the Preferences menu.

options.text: It can only be changed on mobile devices
options.explanation: Time zone settings are available in both desktop and mobile preferences.

questions.question: If you accidentally delete your entire account, what is the timeframe for content restoration?

options.text: We can restore a snapshot of your content within the past 30 days
options.explanation: Notion keeps backups of their database, allowing them to restore a snapshot of your content from the last 30 days.

options.text: We can restore content for up to 90 days
options.explanation: The article specifies a 30-day window for content restoration.

options.text: We cannot restore deleted accounts or pages
options.explanation: Notion can help restore content for up to 30 days if you contact support.

options.text: We can restore content permanently immediately
options.explanation: Restoration is not immediate; it requires contacting support and relies on the 30-day backup window.
